lanes.purpose: Quick local sanity before or during a small task.
lanes.when_to_run: After small edits that could touch layering or before handing off a partial branch.
lanes.notes: Fast is not enough for final completion of runtime, eval, or operations tasks.

lanes.purpose: Normal Codex completion checks for most Python/docs/governance tasks.
lanes.when_to_run: Before final response for most tasks unless a narrower user request explicitly scopes verification down.
Before origin sync for large repo-wide tasks.
lanes.notes: Does not include optional Cargo checks.

lanes.purpose: Docs, index, README, audit, or command metadata edits.
lanes.when_to_run: After documentation-only changes that do not touch executable Python paths.
lanes.notes: Use standard/full if docs update accepted status, eval posture, public-alpha safety, or parity claims.

lanes.when_to_run: After web/API route-policy, status, route inventory, or hosting-pack changes.
lanes.notes: This is rehearsal evidence only and not production readiness.

lanes.purpose: Publication-plane and canonical site/dist static artifact checks before deployment evidence review or artifact promotion.
lanes.when_to_run: After publication inventory, public static site, generated static site, route/data/client contract, base-path, GitHub Pages workflow, repository layout, or future static-hosting preparation changes.
lanes.notes: Validates contracts, canonical site/dist output, static Pages workflow readiness, repository layout, and the repo-local static snapshot seed only; it does not manually deploy, add backend provider files, enable live backend behavior, publish production signed snapshots, add real signing keys, or record external observations.

lanes.purpose: Python-oracle and future Rust parity discipline.
lanes.when_to_run: After Python oracle, source-registry, query-planner, local-index, memory, or Rust parity fixture changes.
lanes.notes: Python-side Rust parity structure checks are required; Cargo workspace execution remains optional until the repo requires a Rust toolchain.

lanes.when_to_run: After eval runner, eval fixture, search usefulness, planner, index, or source-coverage changes.
lanes.notes: External baseline observations remain manual and pending unless committed as evidence records.

lanes.purpose: High-risk regression guards from Hard Test Pack v0.
lanes.when_to_run: After eval, public-alpha, README/docs, Python-oracle golden, Rust parity, source registry, memory, AIDE, or test registry changes.
lanes.notes: This lane is stdlib-only, local, and avoids persistent servers or external searches.

lanes.purpose: Optional Rust skeleton and candidate seam checks.
lanes.when_to_run: Only when Cargo is installed in the local environment.
lanes.notes: Never fail normal Python verification solely because Cargo is unavailable.

notes: Public Search Safety / Abuse Guard v0 validation is stdlib-only and constrains the local public search runtime plus future hosted review; it does not implement rate-limit middleware, telemetry runtime, hosted backend, live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, local path search, arbitrary URL fetch, or production claims.

Local Public Search Runtime v0 validation is stdlib-only local/prototype backend verification; it opens no public listener, deploys nothing, calls no external sources, and adds no hosted backend, downloads, installs, uploads, accounts, telemetry, live probes, or production claims.

Public Search Static Handoff v0 validation is stdlib-only static publication verification; it adds no backend hosting, fake hosted URL, live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, local path search, telemetry, JavaScript requirement, or production claim.

Public Search Rehearsal v0 validation is stdlib-only local/prototype evidence review. It records safe-query and blocked-request evidence without deploying, calling external sources, enabling hosted search, live probes, downloads, installs, uploads, local path search, accounts, telemetry, or production claims.

Search Usefulness Source Expansion v2 validation is stdlib-only and fixture-only; it checks recorded source metadata, local-index/public-search projection, audit-count movement, pending/manual external baselines, and no live calls, scraping, crawling, real binaries, download/install/upload actions, local path search, hosted search, or production relevance claims.

Search Usefulness Delta v2 validation is stdlib-only and audit-only; it checks P32 baseline provenance, current audit counts, status deltas, selected query movement, source-family impact, hard-eval/public-search status, pending/manual external baselines, remaining gaps, and no unsupported superiority claims.

Validate-Only Pack Import Tool v0 validates explicit pack roots or known examples and emits Pack Import Report v0 without import, staging, indexing, uploads, network calls, model calls, runtime mutation, public-search mutation, or master-index mutation.

Local Quarantine/Staging Model v0 validation is planning-only: it checks local_private defaults, ignored future local-state roots, prohibited roots, reset/delete/export docs, and no staging runtime or search/master-index impact.
Staging Report Path Contract v0 validation checks stdout defaults, explicit output path policy, forbidden committed roots, redaction docs, ignored local report roots, and no staging/report runtime.

Local Staging Manifest Format v0 validation checks the contract-only manifest schema, synthetic examples, hard no-mutation guarantees, staged candidate semantics, reset/delete/export policy, checksums, no private paths/secrets, and no staging runtime.

Staged Pack Inspector v0 validation checks read-only inspection of synthetic local staging manifests, JSON/human summaries, redaction, hard no-mutation flags, and no staging/import/index/upload/runtime/public-search/master-index side effects.

AI-Assisted Evidence Drafting Plan v0 validation checks disabled-by-default AI drafting policy, synthetic candidate-only flow examples, required typed output validation, required review, no model calls, no provider runtime, no API keys/secrets, no private-data remote defaults, and no public-search/local-index/master-index mutation.

Post-P49 Platform Audit v0 validation is stdlib-only audit governance. It checks required files, classification values, command evidence, subsystem coverage, query-intelligence gaps, gated work lists, next milestones, and no positive hosted-search/live-probe/AI-runtime/external-baseline/production claims.

Post-P50 Remediation Pack v0 validation is stdlib-only audit governance. It checks required files, remediation item IDs/statuses, governance docs, pack-validator CLI remediation, Pages evidence honesty, Cargo status, gated work lists, next branch, and no product behavior expansion claims.

Static Deployment Evidence / GitHub Pages Repair v0 validation is stdlib-only audit governance. It checks required files, site/dist artifact discipline, Pages workflow upload path, operator steps for unverified deployment, static-only public claims, and no hosted-backend/live-probe/dynamic-backend/deployment-success overclaim.

Hosted Public Search Wrapper v0 validation is stdlib-only local rehearsal and audit governance. It checks a deployable local_index_only wrapper, safe environment defaults, route smoke behavior, templates, and no deployed-hosted/backend/live-probe/download/upload/account/telemetry/index-mutation claims.

P57 Public Search Safety Evidence checks are stdlib-only local/public-alpha safety evidence; they use an in-process hosted-wrapper harness and add no deployment, live probes, external calls, downloads, uploads, accounts, telemetry, arbitrary URL fetch, or production claim.

P58 Hosted Public Search Rehearsal checks are stdlib-only localhost hosted-mode evidence; they start a local wrapper process and add no deployment, external calls, live probes, downloads, uploads, accounts, telemetry, arbitrary URL fetch, or production claim.

P59 Query Observation Contract v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no telemetry, persistence, public query logging, result-cache mutation, miss-ledger mutation, probe queue, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.

P60 Shared Query/Result Cache v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no telemetry, persistence, runtime cache writes, public query logging, miss ledger mutation, search need mutation, probe enqueueing, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.

P61 Search Miss Ledger v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no telemetry, persistence, runtime ledger writes, public query logging, search need creation, probe enqueueing, result cache mutation, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.

P62 Search Need Record v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no telemetry, persistence, runtime need store, public query logging, demand-count runtime, probe enqueueing, candidate-index mutation, result cache mutation, miss ledger mutation, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.

P63 Probe Queue v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no telemetry, persistence, public query logging, probe execution, live source calls, source-cache mutation, evidence-ledger mutation, candidate-index mutation, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.

P64 Candidate Index v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no telemetry, persistence, public search candidate injection, candidate promotion runtime, source-cache mutation, evidence-ledger mutation, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.

P65 Candidate Promotion Policy v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no promotion runtime, automatic acceptance, review queue runtime, candidate/source/evidence/index mutation, telemetry, external calls, or live probes.

P66 Known Absence Page v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no runtime pages, telemetry, persistent query logging, global absence claims, live probes, downloads, uploads, installs, source-cache mutation, evidence-ledger mutation, candidate mutation, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.

P67 Query Privacy and Poisoning Guard v0 validation is stdlib-only contract/example governance; it adds no runtime guard, telemetry, account/IP tracking, public query logging, query-intelligence mutation, external calls, or index/master-index mutation.
P71 Internet Archive Metadata Connector Approval Pack v0 commands are approval-only and perform no IA calls, downloads, connector runtime, cache/ledger mutation, or public-query fanout.

P72 Wayback/CDX/Memento Connector Approval Pack v0 commands are approval-only and perform no Wayback/CDX/Memento calls, capture replay, WARC download, connector runtime, cache/ledger mutation, or public-query fanout.

P73 GitHub Releases Connector Approval Pack v0 commands are approval-only and perform no GitHub API calls, repository clone, release asset/source archive download, token use, connector runtime, cache/ledger mutation, or public-query fanout.

P74 PyPI Metadata Connector Approval Pack v0 commands are approval-only and perform no PyPI API calls, package downloads, installs, dependency resolution, connector runtime, cache/ledger mutation, or public-query fanout.

P75 npm Metadata Connector Approval Pack v0 commands are approval-only and perform no npm registry API calls, npm/yarn/pnpm CLI calls, package downloads, installs, dependency resolution, lifecycle script execution, npm audit, connector runtime, cache/ledger mutation, or public-query fanout.

P76 Software Heritage Connector Approval Pack v0 commands are approval-only and perform no Software Heritage API calls, SWHID resolution, origin lookup, source content/blob fetch, repository clone, source archive download, token use, connector runtime, cache/ledger mutation, or public-query fanout.
P77 Public Hosted Deployment Evidence adds verifier/validator commands; repo-config verifier may perform HTTP only to configured Eureka URLs and makes no deployment claim.

P78 External Baseline Comparison Report commands are local-only evidence/reporting checks. They read committed manual observations and local Eureka audit/index outputs, perform no web/search/source/model calls, and make no superiority or production claim.
P79 Object Page Contract commands are local-only governance checks. They do not implement runtime pages, call sources, enable downloads/installs/execution, or mutate indexes/cache/ledger/candidates.

P80 Source Page Contract commands are local-only governance checks. They do not implement runtime pages, connector runtime, source sync execution, call sources, enable downloads/installs/execution, claim source trust, or mutate indexes/cache/ledger/candidates.

P81 Comparison Page Contract v0 validation is stdlib-only and contract-only; it adds no runtime comparison pages, live source calls, source sync execution, winner selection, telemetry, downloads, installs, execution, source trust claim, or index/cache/ledger/candidate/master-index mutation.

P82 Cross-Source Identity Resolution Contract v0 validation is stdlib-only and contract-only; it adds no runtime identity resolver, destructive merge, record merge, candidate promotion, live source calls, telemetry, source trust claim, or index/cache/ledger/candidate/master-index mutation.
P83 adds Result Merge and Deduplication v0 contract validators and tests; all are local-only and network-free.
P84 adds Evidence-Weighted Ranking v0 contract validators and tests; all are local-only, network-free, and do not apply runtime ranking or mutate indexes/cache/ledger.
P85 adds Compatibility-Aware Ranking v0 contract validators and tests; all are local-only, network-free, and do not apply runtime ranking or mutate indexes/cache/ledger.
P85 adds Compatibility-Aware Ranking v0 contract validators and tests; all are local-only, network-free, and do not apply runtime ranking or mutate indexes/cache/ledger.
P85 adds Compatibility-Aware Ranking v0 contract validators and tests; all are local-only, network-free, and do not apply runtime ranking or mutate indexes/cache/ledger.
P86 Public Query Observation Runtime Planning v0 validation is planning-only and adds no runtime observation writes, telemetry, raw query retention, public aggregates, or mutation.
